positive: Minimalist celestial forest scene, hyper-detailed line art illustration, a cluster of stylized, glowing geometric trees rooted in a subtle crescent moon shape. The trees should feature clean, flowing silhouettes and contain interwoven astral elements like nebulae swirls, tiny constellations, and stylized moons. The overall composition must be highly centered and symmetrical, utilizing strong contrast between deep indigo, midnight blues, and luminous golds/teal accents. Suitable for screen printing on dark apparel, with crisp lines and negative space emphasizing the forest shape. Clean, vector aesthetic, graphic novel quality, intricate linework.
negative: photo, realistic, 3d render, depth of field, blur, grainy, noise, text, signature, watermark, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, low detail
